description: A designed composite 'criminal alien' card combining seized-drug evidence imagery with an inset mugshot. The main background photograph shows a large stash of suspected narcotics: many kilo-sized bricks individually wrapped in clear plastic (some stamped with a circular cartel/brand insignia), stacked in a pyramid on a wooden table/floor against a plain wall, with additional taped bundles and bags of white powder in the foreground (one bundle showing 'BLACK AND WHITE' branding). Inset in the upper-right corner, framed as a separate panel, is a booking mugshot of a bald, older man in a white T-shirt photographed against the standard height-measurement backdrop (numbers '69 / 66 / 63 / 60' visible on the side scale). The composition juxtaposes the offender's face with the volume of seized drugs to dramatize the threat. This matches the tweet identifying Raul Magana-Herrera, a 'criminal illegal alien from Mexico' sentenced for methamphetamine distribution and arrested by ICE. The technique is a 'busted'/rogues-gallery style enforcement-trophy graphic. Target audience: general public, to publicize ICE arrests of criminal aliens and project toughness on drug crime.
notable_text: (no headline slogan; cartel insignia stamps on drug bricks; 'BLACK AND WHITE' label on a bundle; mugshot height-scale numbers 60-69)
